text: Merge launched Gateway, a new way to route all your LLM traffic across OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and more through one API endpoint, with spend limits and full observability baked in from day one.
OpenRouter is on the 2026 Enterprise Tech 30. Big thanks @Wing_VC and @EricNewcomer!

We have customers handling thousands of LLM requests for their products — and it’s always a stitched-together mix of in-house tools for routing, access, spend, and logs. 

Now it’s all together in one place with Merge Gateway.

Huge day at @merge_api! Introducing GATEWAY 🎉

Smarter LLM routing, auto fallback, built-in cost guardrails, and enterprise-grade security… all in one API. Our bread and butter. 

Get $10 in free LLM credits to try it now!

So proud of this team.

The duct tape era of LLM infra is over.

We present to you Merge Gateway. 
Zero downtime. Reliable agents. Optimizing for performance. And all through a Unified API - our specialty.

Signup here: gateway.merge.dev

给老婆电脑和手机都部署了个LLM语音输入。

ElevenLab的API同时接收中文或日文语音输入，后面叠了一个Groq的OSS-120B的后处理模型，负责对转写出来的中文或日文进行润色，调整语气，去掉多余的词之类的。

怎么讲，科技改变生活。看韩剧的时间都变多了。
